Legal Documents

StudyLoop Legal

Privacy Policy & Terms of Use — your rights and our responsibilities

Effective Date: February 24, 2026
⚠️

Before publishing: Replace all highlighted [PLACEHOLDERS] with your actual details and have this reviewed by a qualified lawyer in your country.

1Introduction

StudyLoop ("we", "our", or "the App") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect when you use StudyLoop, how we use it, who we share it with, and what rights you have. By downloading or using StudyLoop, you agree to the practices described in this document.

This policy applies to the StudyLoop Android application and covers all features including Alarms, Study Reminders with Spaced Repetition, Notes, To-Do Lists, the built-in Calculator, Brain Break Games (Tetris and Sudoku), and the Review Calendar.

2Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide Directly

  • Reminder content, notes, and to-do list items you create within the app
  • Alarm labels and schedules you configure
  • Your Google account name and email address if you sign in via Google (Firebase Authentication)

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

  • Device identifiers (Android Advertising ID) used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads
  • App usage analytics collected by Firebase Analytics (session length, feature usage, crash reports)
  • Game progress data (high scores, coin rewards) stored locally on your device only
  • Device information: model, OS version, language, time zone

2.3 Information from Third-Party SDKs

SDKPurpose & Data Collected
Google AdMobDisplays ads. Collects device advertising ID, IP address, and interaction data to serve personalised or non-personalised ads.
Firebase AuthenticationHandles Google Sign-In. Stores your Google account UID, display name, and email.
Firebase FirestoreCloud sync of your reminders and notes across devices. Data is stored on Google's servers.
Firebase AnalyticsApp performance and usage analytics. Collects anonymised event and session data.
Firebase CrashlyticsCrash reporting to help us fix bugs. Collects crash stack traces and device info.

3How We Use Your Information

  • To provide core app functionality: alarms, reminders, spaced repetition scheduling, notes, to-do management, and Brain Break games
  • To sync your data across multiple devices when you are signed in to your Google account
  • To display advertisements via Google AdMob to fund the free version of the app
  • To analyse app usage and improve features via Firebase Analytics
  • To diagnose and fix crashes via Firebase Crashlytics
  • To send you review notifications as part of the spaced repetition schedule you have set up

✅ Your reminder content, notes, and to-do items are YOUR data. We do not sell, rent, or share the content you create with advertisers or any third party for marketing purposes.

4Advertising (Google AdMob)

StudyLoop uses Google AdMob to display banner and interstitial advertisements. AdMob may use your device's advertising ID and other non-personal signals to show you personalised ads based on your interests.

  • You can opt out of personalised advertising at any time via: Settings → Google → Ads → Opt out of Ads Personalisation
  • You can also visit Google's Ad Settings at: https://adssettings.google.com
  • Even if you opt out of personalised ads, you will still see non-personalised advertisements in the app

StudyLoop is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided personal information, please contact us immediately.

5Data Storage and Security

Storage LocationWhat is Stored There
On your device (local)All app data when you are not signed in: reminders, notes, to-dos, alarms, game scores, and coin rewards. Stored in Android SharedPreferences and Room database.
Google Firebase (cloud)Your reminders and notes when you choose to enable Cloud Sync via Google Sign-In. Hosted on Google's secure servers.

We take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

6Data Retention

Data TypeRetention Period
Reminders, Notes, To-DosRetained until you delete them or uninstall the app
Game scores & coinsStored locally; cleared on app uninstall
Firebase Auth dataRetained while your account is active; deleted when you delete your account
AdMob advertising dataGoverned by Google's own data retention policies
Analytics & Crash dataRetained for up to 14 months per Firebase default settings

7Your Rights

Depending on your country, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Right to access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Right to correction: Request that we correct inaccurate data
  • Right to deletion: Request that we delete your personal data ("right to be forgotten")
  • Right to data portability: Request your data in a machine-readable format
  • Right to object: Object to processing of your data for advertising purposes
  • Right to withdraw consent: Withdraw consent for data collection at any time

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at: [email protected]

GDPR (EU/EEA users): You have the right to lodge a complaint with your national data protection authority. POPIA (South Africa): You may contact the Information Regulator at [email protected].

8Android Permissions Explained

PermissionWhy StudyLoop Needs It
SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARMTo fire alarms and review notifications at precisely the scheduled time
POST_NOTIFICATIONSTo send you review reminder notifications
CAMERATo take a photo to attach to a reminder (only when you tap the camera button)
READ_MEDIA_IMAGESTo detect when you take a screenshot so we can prompt you to save it as a reminder
RECORD_AUDIOTo record a voice note to attach to a reminder (only when you tap the microphone button — never recorded in the background)
WAKE_LOCKTo ensure alarm notifications fire even when the screen is off
INTERNETFor Firebase cloud sync and AdMob ads
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETEDTo re-schedule your alarms and notifications after the device restarts

9Third-Party Services and Links

StudyLoop may display advertisements that link to third-party websites or apps. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third parties. We encourage you to read the privacy policies of any third-party services you access through ads or links in the app.

10Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the Effective Date at the top of this document and, where required by law, notify you via in-app notification or email. Continued use of StudyLoop after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

11Contact Us

1Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, or using StudyLoop ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not download or use the App.

These Terms apply to all versions of StudyLoop, including future updates and new features. We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time, with notice provided through the App or via email where practicable.

2Licence to Use

Subject to your compliance with these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to:

  • Download and install StudyLoop on Android devices you personally own or control
  • Use the App for your personal, non-commercial educational and productivity purposes

This licence does not include the right to:

  • Copy, modify, distribute, sell, or resell any part of StudyLoop
  • Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the source code of the App
  • Create derivative works based on the App
  • Use the App for any commercial purpose without our prior written consent

3Your Account

StudyLoop offers optional Google Sign-In via Firebase Authentication. If you choose to sign in:

  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your Google account credentials
  • You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
  • You must notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account
  • You must provide accurate information and keep it up to date

You may use StudyLoop without signing in. In this case, your data is stored only locally on your device and will be lost if you uninstall the App or clear its data.

4Your Content

You retain full ownership of all reminders, notes, to-do items, and other content you create in StudyLoop ("Your Content").

By using the App, you grant us a limited licence to store and process Your Content solely for the purpose of operating the App and providing its features to you. We do not use Your Content for advertising, sell it to third parties, or use it for any purpose beyond providing the service.

You agree not to create or store content that:

  • Violates any applicable law or regulation
  • Infringes the intellectual property rights of any third party
  • Contains malicious code, viruses, or harmful data
  • Is defamatory, obscene, or otherwise objectionable

5Advertising

The free version of StudyLoop is supported by advertisements served by Google AdMob. By using the App, you acknowledge and agree that:

  • Advertisements will be displayed within the App
  • Google AdMob may use your device's advertising identifier to show relevant ads
  • You can opt out of personalised ads through your device settings as described in our Privacy Policy
  • We are not responsible for the content of third-party advertisements

6Acceptable Use

You agree to use StudyLoop only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to:

  • Use the App in any way that violates applicable local, national, or international law
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the App or its related systems
  • Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the App
  • Use automated tools to scrape, mine, or extract data from the App
  • Impersonate any person or entity in connection with your use of the App

7Intellectual Property

StudyLoop and all its original content — including the name, logo, design, spaced repetition algorithm, UI, Brain Break games, and underlying code — are the intellectual property of Michael Nketia and are protected by copyright and trademark laws.

The StudyLoop name and logo are trademarks of Michael Nketia. You may not use these trademarks without our prior written permission.

Third-party libraries and SDKs used within the App (Firebase, AdMob, etc.) are subject to their own respective licences and terms.

8Disclaimer of Warranties

StudyLoop is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

We do not warrant that:

  • The App will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure
  • The spaced repetition scheduling will guarantee memory retention for every user
  • Alarm and notification delivery is guaranteed — this depends on your device settings, battery optimisation, and Android OS version
  • Any defects or errors in the App will be corrected

9Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Michael Nketia and StudyLoop shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the App, including but not limited to:

  • Loss of data or content stored in the App
  • Missed alarms or notifications due to device-level restrictions
  • Any reliance on study schedules or reminders generated by the App

⚠️ Note on alarms: Android battery optimisation and device manufacturers may restrict background processes. For critical alarms, always verify your device's battery settings allow StudyLoop to run in the background. StudyLoop is not liable for missed alarms.

10Termination

We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access to StudyLoop at any time, with or without notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms or any applicable law.

You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it. If you have a Firebase account, you may request deletion of your cloud data by contacting us at [email protected].

11Governing Law and Disputes

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Ghana, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Any dispute arising from these Terms or your use of StudyLoop shall first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved within 30 days, disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Ghana.

12Changes to These Terms

We may revise these Terms at any time. When we make material changes, we will notify you via in-app notification or email at least 7 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of the App after that period constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
